---
title: "L'étude"
image: "images/logo_final_orange_darkbg_v2.png"
about:
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 60%
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

*Traduction française à venir.*

ADHD-HIV-PrEP is a cross-sectional survey nested within the Swiss HIV
Cohort Study (SHCS) and the SwissPrEPared cohort, estimating how
common ADHD traits are among people living with HIV and people taking
HIV pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) in Switzerland. See the
[English version](../en/Survey.html) for the full description.

::: {style="background-color: #f0f0f0; padding: 1rem; text-align: center; margin-top: 4rem;"}
<p><a href="https://www.shcs.ch" target="_blank">
<img src="images/shcs_logo.jpg" alt="Swiss HIV Cohort Study" style="height:120px; margin: 0 1rem;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://www.chuv.ch" target="_blank">
<img src="images/chuv_logo.png" alt="CHUV Lausanne" style="height:120px; margin: 0 1rem;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://www.usz.ch" target="_blank">
<img src="images/usz_logo2.png" alt="University Hospital Zurich" style="height:80px; margin: 0 1rem;"/>
</a>
<a href="https://www.swissprepared.ch" target="_blank">
<img src="images/swissprepared_RGB-1.png" alt="SwissPrEPared" style="height:120px; margin: 0 1rem;"/>
</a></p>
:::
